name: Select
title: 下拉选择框
description: 基于Bootstrap form-select原生下拉组件，通过数据源渲染选项，支持多尺寸、禁用、占位提示，单选下拉选择
author: LiuHan

properties.name: dataSource
properties.description: 下拉选项数据源数组，label展示文本，value绑定选中值
properties.label: 选项数据源

properties.name: value
properties.description: 当前选中项value，onChange实现双向绑定
properties.label: 选中值

properties.name: placeholder
properties.description: 未选择时显示占位提示文字
properties.label: 占位提示

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: 禁用下拉框，无法展开选择
properties.label: 禁用

events.name: onChange
events.description: 切换下拉选项触发，参数(选中值,原生event)
events.label: 值变更
